anomalies.description: No PodDisruptionBudget manifest found. The dotCMS chart v1.0.34 supports pdb.auto mode.
anomalies.recommendation: Enable pdb: enabled: true in Helm values when replicas > 1

anomalies.description: Single replica in build-1 — no high availability.
Soft (preferred) pod anti-affinity in build-1. Multiple pods may land on same node during spot reaping (TylerTech incident 2026-03-17).
anomalies.recommendation: Upgrade to requiredDuringSchedulingIgnoredDuringExecution or enable chart PDB

anomalies.description: Uses deprecated 'kubernetes.io/ingress.class' annotation instead of spec.ingressClassName.
anomalies.recommendation: Migrate to spec.ingressClassName for Kubernetes 1.18+ compliance
